headline: HSBC Launches AI-Powered Wealth Intelligence Platform
summary: HSBC has launched an AI-powered Wealth Intelligence platform, as reported by Fintech Global on 18 September 2025. No further details about the platform's features, target clients, or geographic rollout are available in the extracted article content.

verified_claims: HSBC has launched an AI-powered Wealth Intelligence platform
unverified_claims: No further details about the platform's features, target clients, or geographic rollout are available in the extracted article content — this claim about absence of detail cannot be fully confirmed because the article body appears truncated/paywalled
_governance.notes: The headline, publisher, and date are all supported by the source article metadata and title. However, the source article body is incomplete — it appears to be cut off at the navigation menu level, likely due to a paywall or extraction issue. The generated entry's claim that 'no further details are available' may be accurate for the extracted content, but cannot be confirmed as accurate for the full article. The paywall caveat is therefore triggered.
